summary: Implement M2 basic route, transport, and seasonal route choice
acceptance_criteria: M2 route and transport state uses compiled road and river definitions from the M2 fixture with stable IDs, explicit capacities/costs, and deterministic tie-breakers.
Seasonal regional curves alter road and river costs/capacities so that at least one fixture origin/destination pair chooses different road versus river routes in different seasons.
Route queries and any movement/transport previews are read-model safe and do not expose mutable WorldState to UI code.
Transport capacity and stock movement invariants prevent negative capacity, duplicate edge use, and order-dependent results.
No full campaign system, army battle loop, siege, diplomacy, or AI strategic planning is implemented in this task.
The task preserves sim-core isolation from React, PixiJS, Electron, DOM, Node filesystem IO, and real-time APIs.
required_tests: Scenario tests prove seasonal road/river route choice changes and route-capacity invariants.
node -e JSON parse/shape check for M2-ROUTE-TRANSPORT-001
notes: Keep this to basic route and transport scaffolding needed for M2 choices; do not start M4 campaign planning.
If route search introduces a new algorithmic performance assumption, include measured evidence in the handoff.
Lead-owned goal-mode, model-routing, and thread-registry updates are allowed only as orchestration recovery evidence for this task; they must not expand implementation scope.
